name: Cottage Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs with salt and pepper just enough to blend yolks and whites.
2. In an 8-inch skillet, melt butter and twirl to coat the bottom of the skillet.
3. Add eggs to hot butter and cook over moderately low heat, lifting eggs from the bottom as they set.
4. When almost set, turn off heat, fold in cottage cheese and finely diced Cheddar cheese.
5. Serve at once. Makes 2 servings.
